summary: Vertical video. Fox News 'Hannity' interview clip of DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin talking about Biden-era border releases compared with Trump enforcement, shown over a Washington DC backdrop with network chyrons. The clip has no music.
notable_text: MARKWAYNE MULLIN / DHS SECRETARY; HANNITY / Hang Out with Sean Hannity; 'TRUMP ADMIN CLEANS UP MESS CREATED BY BIDEN'S OPEN BORDER'; FOX NEWS / BREAKING NEWS
